title: Cloudflare Workers Documentation
memo: Main reference for the runtime used by this demo app.

title: Cloudflare D1 Documentation
memo: Useful when explaining how bookmark rows are stored.

title: Cloudflare R2 Documentation
memo: Included for the future OGP image storage feature.

title: Hono
memo: Small web framework used for the Worker API routes.

title: Vite
memo: Frontend build tool for the React client.

title: React
memo: UI library used by the bookmark app.

title: TypeScript Documentation
memo: Reference for the shared client and Worker types.

title: Vitest
memo: Test runner used for the app and Worker unit tests.

title: React Testing Library
memo: Helpful examples for testing user-facing UI behavior.

title: Fetch API
memo: Reference for browser and Worker fetch calls.

title: History API
memo: Used by the search feature to keep query state in the URL.

title: HTML dialog element
memo: Background reading for confirmation and dialog patterns.

title: SQLite SELECT
memo: Useful for understanding D1 SELECT, LIMIT, and OFFSET queries.

title: SQLite LIKE operator
memo: Reference for the demo app's LIKE-based search.

title: Cloudflare Workers SDK
memo: Source repository for Wrangler and the Workers tooling.
